channel.title: GitHub VHDL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of VHDL in GitHub

item.title: aws/aws-fpga
item.description: Official repository of the AWS EC2 FPGA Hardware and Software Development Kit

item.title: stnolting/neorv32
item.description: 🖥️ A small, customizable and extensible MCU-class 32-bit RISC-V soft-core CPU and microcontroller-like SoC written in platform-independent VHDL.

item.title: OSVVM/OSVVM
item.description: OSVVM Utility Library: AlertLogPkg, CoveragePkg, RandomPkg, ScoreboardGenericPkg, MemoryPkg, TbUtilPkg, TranscriptPkg, ...
